definitions.text: To be moved downwards. To move to a lower position under the effect of gravity.
examples: Thrown from a cliff, the stone fell 100 feet before hitting the ground.
I fell unconscious on the floor.

definitions.text: To move to a lower position under the effect of gravity.
examples: Thrown from a cliff, the stone fell 100 feet before hitting the ground.
I fell unconscious on the floor.

definitions.text: To come down, to drop or descend.
The act of moving to a lower position under the effect of gravity.
A reduction in quantity, pitch, etc.
The cry given when a whale is sighted, or harpooned.
The chasing of a hunted whale.
